projects.title: Dark Matter Constraints
projects.subtitle: Milky Way satellite analysis
projects.description: Constrained Warm Dark Matter particle mass using Milky Way satellite galaxy data.
projects.extendedDescription: Compared model predictions against Milky Way satellite observations. Cut runtime by 100x, wrote a methods summary for an upcoming publication, presented findings at the 2023 OSU Physics Summer Research Program poster session, and published the code and writeup on GitHub.
projects.impact: Improved dark matter constraints and cut runtime by 100x.
